And like I said, he did a whole interview with me kind of training on how to use Childers Chunks. And then he allowed us to license his entire training program, which is in there as well. And man, it is an insane thing. I recommend for you listen to the interview with John and then go back through and actually start listening to all of the audios of how he does his Childers Chunks. Listen to him, learn him, memorize him. I got literally listening to him on my phone all the time to get the stories in my head. How can I tell the story? How can I use the story in my presentations? That is the power of this part of the training program. And then you're gonna learn all these other things. How to do the stack, how to do trial closes, how to do the repitch, how to do the price marinate, how to do the false belief. I was like, so many cool amazing things about closing there inside this members area that you were gonna go insane for and you were gonna love and I cannot wait for you to get access to it. And so you understand the framework, they're gonna be weaving these closes into that framework. And I promise you it'll help take your business and your sales to the next level.
